prose: The frontier-orbitals calculation for furan, performed at the DFT B3LYP/def2-TZVP level of theory (tier 'standard') in the gas phase, yielded a HOMO energy of -6.3598 eV and a LUMO energy of -0.10240 eV. The resulting HOMO-LUMO gap is 6.2574 eV. The calculation converged successfully with no warnings.
